title: support using previously declared types/localparams/parameters in package
body:
This commit adds support for using previously declared typedefs, enum values, and localparams/parameters within the same package. It also adds syntax support for parameters in systemverilog packages.

(parameters in systemverilog packages can't actually be overridden, so
allowing parameters in addition to localparams doesn't actually add any
new functionality, but it's useful to be able to use the parameter
keyword also within packages, especially for existing code)
